已实现 session_sweeper.py + main.py startup/shutdown 集成，超时 paused session 自动 fail，60s 轮询，4 tests 通过
Completed: limited streaming first round to one confirmable business tool, tightened prompt, reduced Resume Agent max_tokens, and verified tests.
Completed: replaced old bd setup codex block with Beads integration minimal block including mandatory session completion and push rules.
Completed: added OpenRouter circuit breaker with fast-fail open state, cooldown probe, success reset, config knobs, and retry regression tests.
Completed: added SSE event ids, persisted public stream events, Last-Event-ID replay, and frontend cursor handling with type/backend regression coverage.
Fixed html hydration warning from browser-injected attributes and added favicon/apple-touch static assets; verified type-check, build, curl, and Playwright hydration probe.
Completed: updated docs/SECURITY.md with security/config/auth/data-retention/vendor checklist and docs/QUALITY_SCORE.md with current quality baseline plus verified backend/frontend gates.
Implemented Resume Agent runtime profile, observability, confirmation hook, session, conversion, OpenRouter adapter, and context compaction slice; verified with backend full pytest and basedpyright.

Implemented Resume Agent runtime profile, observability, confirmation hook, session, conversion, OpenRouter adapter, and context compaction slice; verified with backend full pytest and basedpyright.
Removed local observability stack and external observer integrations; diagnostics now rely on request, DB, and agent logs. Verified with full backend pytest and basedpyright.
backend.sh and backend/.env.example now default LOG_FORMAT=text; restarted backend and verified backend/logs/backend.log contains text-format app.ready output.

Chunk-level agent trace logs now require AGENT_TRACE_CHUNK_LOG_ENABLED=true. Default logs keep stage-level request/response/tool/run events. Verified focused pytest, basedpyright, and restarted backend with text logs.
backend.sh now sends uvicorn output through tee only, so terminal output and backend/logs/backend.log receive the same stream. Verified by restart and comparing terminal capture with log tail.

OpenRouter stream now logs request/header/SSE/text/tool/done/error stages, configurable first-event/token timeouts are enforced, repeated unexpected read-only tool calls are suppressed, and backend tests plus basedpyright pass.
OPENROUTER_FIRST_TOKEN_TIMEOUT_SECONDS now defaults to 0, which disables the first-token stage timeout while preserving the normal OpenRouter read timeout. Focused pytest and basedpyright passed.

Removed backend keyword-based read_only/job_match tool routing. Resume Agent now defaults to the full resume tool set for every request so the model decides whether to call tools. Full backend pytest and basedpyright passed.
Implemented explicit OpenRouter reasoning off and covered request body with a focused test.

Implemented ReAct one-tool-per-model-turn runtime: removed first_round_business_tool_limit skip path, pruned multi-tool assistant responses to the first tool call, and let confirmation results feed back to the model instead of stopping the run. Full backend pytest and basedpyright passed.

Normalized AI markdown rendering for accidental indented prose, preserved fenced code blocks, and added a prompt guard against indented ordinary replies. Frontend type-check and focused normalization checks passed.

Refactored ResumeAgent prompt construction to mirror Pi active tools: available tool summaries and tool protocol now derive from the actual profiled schemas passed to the model. Added read_only profile coverage, focused runtime tests, full backend pytest, and basedpyright verification.

Moved tool availability conditionals out of system.md and into Python prompt context generation. system.md now uses clean tool_usage_rules/tool_protocol placeholders, rendered from active tools. Focused tests, basedpyright, and full backend pytest passed.
Refactored prompt loader to Kimi-style ${...} variables, updated resume_agent/system.md placeholders, and kept tools passed natively. Focused tests, basedpyright, and full backend pytest passed.
Implemented Claude Code-style tool prompt refactor: stable system prompt, per-tool schema guidance, active API tools unchanged, model decides tool use.
Slimmed resume system prompt to stable policy text, removed visible tool mirror, and kept tool details in API schemas.
Added confirmation flow observability and verified backend/frontend type checks.
Refactored resume runtime to an explicit local ReAct loop and verified full backend tests.
Implemented Claude Code-style stop guard for fake mutation claims and covered sync/stream regressions.
Enforced structured tool-call truth semantics, hid tool-call preambles, added deterministic invalid-turn fallback, and verified backend tests.
Implemented Claude Code style no-tool stop validator for unrealized resume edit action headings, with hidden feedback retry and deterministic fallback.
Implemented Claude Code style stop validator pipeline and covered shorthand unrealized edit headings from backend log run ea2fad29.
Configured separate log sinks: colorized terminal output and plain backend log file output, with regression coverage for ANSI-free file logs.
Implemented frontend terminal/file log split
frontend.sh now re-execs under Bash when invoked by sh and avoids process substitution in the logging pipeline.
Removed ResumeAgent default max_iterations=6; runtime now runs unbounded by default and only enforces explicit max_iterations. Added regression coverage beyond six tool turns.
Deleted Resume Agent stop guard, retry/fallback paths, and stop-guard traces. Updated tests so no-tool model text is surfaced directly.
Completed: tool-call preamble text now streams to the frontend before the tool pending event, with regression coverage.
Added structured OpenRouter tool-call stream debug logs and regression coverage.
Added diagnostic logs for backend SSE tool event emission, frontend SSE event handling, and resume editor render snapshots; behavior unchanged.
Implemented early tool-call start events from OpenRouter first tool-name delta and deduplicated visible tool_call UI events; added regression coverage.
Accepted tool diff now shows 思考中 while the stream is waiting for the next model text event.
注册页确认密码现在 onChange 实时校验；/zh/register 显示中文错误、阻止无效提交并在修正后一致时清除提示；auth e2e/type-check 通过。
Added interview header end button that calls endInterview, hides after completion, and exposes report entry; covered by Playwright regression.
Added manual report generation endpoint and UI button; completed interviews can generate and display structured assessment reports, with empty sessions skipped safely.
Added safe fallbacks for new interview report UI messages so stale next-intl message caches do not throw MISSING_MESSAGE.
Added safe interview report generation stage logs and readable request.finished text labels for long-running report requests.
Report generation now falls back to a conservative saved report when the LLM returns non-strict JSON; invalid JSON is logged and no longer returns 500.

Implemented email password reset and logged-in password change flow with backend E2E coverage, frontend reset page, login entry point, and settings password section hidden for OAuth-only users.

Added resume editor start-interview entry point. Resumes with saved job context create an interview session directly; resumes without context route to the interview center create panel with the current resume preselected.

Resume edit start-interview now always creates an interview session directly from the current resume and navigates to the interview page; the edit-page path no longer opens the interview-center create panel.

Implemented Kimi-cli style protocol hardening: prompt requires no explanations during tool calls, invalid OpenRouter tool JSON becomes recoverable tool failure instead of stream break/pending confirmation, runtime emits tool_call_failed for parse errors, and frontend no longer marks bare tool_call as completed. Implemented assistant tool_call serialization so empty visible content omits the content field, while non-empty text is preserved. Added focused OpenRouter regression tests.
Implemented stable streamed tool_call assembly: id/name set once per index and arguments continue accumulating. Added duplicated id/name regression test.
Added focused regression coverage that finish_reason=tool_calls without parsed tool_call deltas stops normally and emits no toolcall events.
